records.question: Which third-party companies have maintenance engineers whose last name is exactly Hirthe?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN maintenance_engineers ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id
WHERE maintenance_engineers.last_name = 'Hirthe'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Maintenance_Engineers AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id WHERE T2.last_name = 'Hirthe'

records.question: What third party companies located at 51515 Conn Corner Suite 696 supply assets with model 08 yy and details system1 that were acquired exactly on 2017-12-20 14:05:17?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON assets.maintenance_contract_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_id
WHERE assets.asset_acquired_date = '2017-12-20 14:05:17' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '51515 Conn Corner Suite 696' AND assets.asset_model = '08 yy' AND assets.asset_details = 'system1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1
INNER JOIN Assets AS T2
  ON T1.company_id = T2.supplier_company_id
WHERE
  T1.company_address = '51515 Conn Corner Suite 696' AND T2.asset_model = '08 yy' AND T2.asset_details = 'system1' AND T2.asset_acquired_date = '2017-12-20 14:05:17'

records.question: Which third party companies based in Egypt have assets acquired on or after 2017-10-24 04:29:17 and have a maintenance engineer named Cullen Kunde?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
JOIN maintenance_engineers ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id
WHERE assets.asset_acquired_date >= '2017-10-24 04:29:17' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Egypt' AND maintenance_engineers.last_name = 'Kunde' AND maintenance_engineers.first_name = 'Cullen'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT TPC.company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies AS TPC
JOIN Assets AS A
  ON TPC.company_id = A.supplier_company_id
JOIN Maintenance_Engineers AS ME
  ON TPC.company_id = ME.company_id
WHERE TPC.company_address LIKE '%Egypt%'
  AND A.asset_acquired_date >= '2017-10-24 04:29:17'
  AND ME.first_name = 'Cullen'
  AND ME.last_name = 'Kunde'

JOIN maintenance_engineers ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id

JOIN maintenance_engineers ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id
